payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is currently remembered as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory without clarification.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
New input: Sara is my niece.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to Sara, who appears to be the same entity as the existing memory, but the stated relationship conflicts with the existing relationship.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new relationship conflicts with an existing memory.
